                   +----------------+
                   |  Group         |
                   |                |
+----------+       |  +----------+  |
|  Source  +-------o->|  Target  |  |
+----------+       |  +----------+  |
                   |                |
+------------+     |  +---------+   |
|  External  +-----o->|  Other  |   |
+------------+     |  +---------+   |
                   |                |
                   |                |
                   +----------------+
